payload.title: schema: rename 'temples' collection to 'hospitals' for Aura Medical context
payload.body: The MySQL schema collection 'temples' still uses the old temple/spiritual naming. Rename to 'hospitals' for the Aura Medical Institute repositioning. Add deprecated_alias field for backward compatibility during the transition. Next deploy should rename the MySQL table.

evidence: storage/schema/collections.php: renamed 'temples' key to 'hospitals', added deprecated_alias: 'temples' for backward compat
Fields unchanged — address, timings, phone, map_link, map_embed_url all work for hospital facilities
unresolved: MySQL table rename from 'temples' to 'hospitals' needs remote DB access on Hostinger
